comment.body:
not sure how shes comparing it to feb 18 opex values, the chart included shows 28MAR as the starting date.

assuming BTerminal has some look back date function, to which "reference" is she doing her relative comparison to conclude complacency?

I would just like to understand this in as much detail as possible, as this seems to be the critical piece of positioning that will allow (or significantly increase the probability of) the macro bearish scenario to play out into Q3

comment.body:
Tariffs (~20%) almost a done deal — "so Trump can say he did it"
→ but real issue = how fast they bleed into consumption → earnings → labor
"Liberation Day" (Apr 2) isn't a volatility clearing event → it's a launchpad for uncertainty

comment.body:
If relief rally happens → short gamma chase higher → leaves bears behind
🔁 Volatility Structure (SPX/VIX nuance)
“Spot up / Vol up” dynamic now in play
→ This is not healthy: signals stress and no belief in the rally
VIX term structure likely to stay elevated unless tariffs = huge nothingburger
VVIX elevated → vol-of-vol bid = fragile moves, prone to reversals
Overwriters pressing upside → gamma imbalance can lead to chase or trap

comment.body:
Pain Trade Setup
Initial rally (“not worst-case tariffs”) → triggers forced buying (dealers, systematics)
THEN macro turns → earnings/guidance cut → fade and flush
Real buyers left holding the bag → reflexive derisking later in April
